personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Migration Engineer | AWS / Python / SQL / Spark

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and strong depth in Python, SQL, Oracle, ETL pipeline design, data migration, reconciliation, and production data reliability. Experienced building and supporting AWS-oriented data platforms using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, PySpark/Spark concepts, data quality controls, and cloud migration patterns. Strong fit for legacy-to-lakehouse migration work involving SQL translation, pipeline validation, data transfer, scheduling, and reconciliation; currently expanding hands-on lakehouse depth around Apache Iceberg and Snowflake concepts.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and supported automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting enterprise telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual data preparation with repeatable, validated data workflows.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift workloads, and structured reporting outputs for forecasting and operational analytics.
Designed and optimized Oracle schemas and historical data structures to support retention, trend analysis, reporting, and seasonal forecasting use cases.
Migrated heavy forecasting workloads from on-prem Oracle processing toward AWS/Redshift-oriented execution patterns, improving scale and supporting parallel analytics workflows.
Implemented data quality, validation, reconciliation, and troubleshooting practices across recurring data pipelines used for executive reporting and infrastructure decision-making.
Worked with monitoring and operational data feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics, integrating heterogeneous source data into normalized reporting datasets and dashboards.
Supported production reliability through runbooks, incident analysis, performance troubleshooting, and automation of recurring operational data processes.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining real-user and synthetic monitoring datasets to identify optimization opportunities for critical revenue-facing systems.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting production visibility and performance analysis.
Upgraded Dynatrace environments and supported security modernization with TLS 1.2 while maintaining continuity of production monitoring.
Partnered with engineering teams on AWS migration readiness and analytics requirements for web and mobile monitoring data.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC platform while maintaining transaction performance and data correctness.
Built validation and test automation in C++/OCCI/OCI to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Optimized SQL and database access patterns for a mission-critical transaction platform, reducing infrastructure footprint while preserving low-latency query performance.
Supported phased cutover planning, schema conversion, reconciliation, and production readiness activities for a complex data store migration.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate performance reporting and reduce manual weekly data collection.
Managed enterprise APM environments with thousands of instrumented agents, dashboards, alert thresholds, and operational reporting standards.
Partnered with WebLogic, WebSphere, J2EE, Oracle, and Linux teams to diagnose bottlenecks and improve operational reliability.
Created technical documentation, training material, and reusable standards for monitoring, onboarding, and production support.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Java, C++, Perl, Korn Shell, JSON, XML
skills.Cloud & Lakehouse: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Amazon Redshift, EC2, ECS, AWS lakehouse patterns, Apache Iceberg concepts, Snowflake concepts, cloud migration patterns
skills.Big Data & File Formats: Apache Spark, PySpark, Hadoop/Hive, Parquet, JSON, Avro concepts, distributed data processing, partitioning, schema evolution concepts
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, pipeline migration, data transfer, data reconciliation, data validation, source-to-target mapping, data quality checks, scheduling concepts, data modeling, data warehousing
skills.Database & Migration: Oracle, Oracle RAC, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL optimization, legacy SQL translation, schema design, migration validation, performance tuning, cutover support
skills.Reliability & Delivery: CI/CD concepts, Git, Docker, Linux/Unix, runbooks, monitoring, troubleshooting, production support, incident response, documentation, Agile collaboration
skills.Adjacent / Learning: Snowflake, Apache Iceberg, Databricks, Delta Lake, Kafka, Terraform, dbt

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift-oriented analytics, PySpark concepts, Parquet optimization, and Bedrock-based Text-to-SQL concepts. Focused on migration from raw data to curated analytics-ready datasets with data quality, cataloging, and query optimization concerns.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark-based capacity forecasting and reporting pipeline using telemetry data, validation workflows, and Streamlit dashboards to replace manual forecasting processes and support infrastructure optimization decisions.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end Python automation pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, LLM-based scoring, JSON artifact generation, quality gates, and application tracking. Uses structured data contracts, validation, and reproducible outputs.
